Introduction

About Me.

ID // DARSHAN
ONLINE
ROLE
PENTESTER
BASE
LONDON
STATUS
ACTIVE

I am a Penetration Tester based in London, United Kingdom, with hands-on experience in offensive security across academic and professional environments. My work spans web application testing, network pentesting, and Active Directory attack chains.

I have contributed to real-world security operations through internships at the Virtually Testing Foundation (remote pentesting) and the Gurugram Police Cyber Security unit, applying threat intelligence and vulnerability analysis in live environments.

Outside client work, I stay sharp through CTF competitions and continuously explore emerging attack techniques aligned with MITRE ATT&CK. Open to US-sponsored roles and international opportunities.
